{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323041156D1C4EDFA357BC520F93E"}"},"total":1832},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7183375415447765792","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看着还不错，虽然有点水，但还是可以看的，有系统（系统不错），境界也不错，而且轻松对敌（该杀杀该闹闹），虽然可能有点无脑，但架不住是爽文，作者后面应该会写个师徒恋？亦或后宫？总体应该是比较偏向休闲欢快的小说","text_exts":[{"e":82,"s":79,"text":"师徒恋","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B8%88%E5%BE%92%E6%81%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774210316C520F93E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227183375415447765792%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227174364104423902219%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B8%88%E5%BE%92%E6%81%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672510553,"group_id":"7174364104423902219","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最佳的报复不是仇恨，而是打心底发出的冷谈。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N434ct4BrF4yMSRtEWTYOkM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3d2c0147b42342568e666d2a2e0ecb5d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791771&x-signature=dWHIdviPJHxr4ydZGkzN2nv4RXA%3D","user_id":"84803777291","user_name":"释然"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"84803777291","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776475591,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7174364104423902219","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+轻松+日常+无敌+签到+系统+收徒】
陈洛穿越荒古大陆，成为道天宗天竹峰的峰主。
觉醒了最强峰主系统，只要收徒，壮大天竹峰就能获取各种奖励。
从此以后，荒古大陆多了一位平平无奇的峰主。
……
【叮，恭喜宿主完成第一次签到，奖励圣境修为！】
……
【叮，恭喜宿主收到第一个徒弟，获得混沌神体！】
……
【叮，恭喜宿主击杀天命之子，获得极道帝兵！】
……
若干年后，尘封无数载的黑暗至尊从禁区中爬出，意图毁灭一切，荒古大陆陷入了前所未有的危机之中……
在天竹峰修行的陈洛双目一睁，一道毁天灭地的瞳光爆发，朝着黑暗至尊的所在轰击而去……
本书又名【开局成为峰主，签到圣境修为】，【不会吧，都有系统了还有我努力？】，【弟子们拼命内卷，我只好躺平了】，【修炼效果无限返还，我直接无敌了】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b8a4d701b8105c78f47dbfc99e6ce99d","author":"兔子吃西瓜","author_id":"","book_id":"7174364104423902219","book_name":"开局天竹峰主，签到圣境修为","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7174407489763410470","read_count":"36985","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1351442"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"727","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,架空,开局,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqno
